name: colab-remote
description: Operate Colab compute, notebooks, resumable files, recoverable jobs, and optional SSH.

interface.shortDescription: Operate authorized Colab runtimes and SSH.
interface.longDescription: Typed OAuth2-only Colab tools for hardware, High-RAM, runtime versions, Python, R, Julia, notebooks, sandboxed Drive storage, resumable files, recoverable jobs, and optional short-lived key-only SSH.
capabilities: Resumable parallel file and folder transfers
Notebook editing and sandboxed Google Drive storage
Progress, silent history, and opt-in notifications
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $operate-colab-remote to run this safely on my authorized Google Colab runtime.
